title: Smoky Sweet American Cheese Grill
description: A funky, cheese-pull, adventurous American dish featuring a vegetable stock cube and caramelized flavors, grilled to perfection on a cedar plank.

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: sharp or extra sharp work best

instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together dissolved vegetable stock cube, smoked paprika, and garlic powder.
Brush the cedar plank with olive oil on both sides.
Place the plank on the grill and let it heat up for 2 minutes.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the plank and caramelize for 5 minutes per side.
In a separate bowl, mix the shredded cheddar cheese with the stock cube mixture until well combined.
Place the cheese mixture on top of the caramelized onions and peppers.
Close the grill lid and let it cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the plank from the grill and let it cool for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve hot and enjoy the smoky sweet flavors.
